allow: PowerShell($n = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($n\) { node --version; npm --version } else { "node not found" })

PowerShell(foreach \($c in 'python','python3','py','cargo','rustc','winget','dotnet','code'\) { $g = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { "$c -> $\($g.Source\)" } else { "$c -> MISSING" } })
